title: ulmaria × purpurea
intro: Ulmaria × purpurea, also known as Vervain, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the common vervain (Verbena officinalis) and the purple vervain (Verbena purpurea). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ulmaria × purpurea include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
